intentSynonyms: show me my cycles in linear
see all my cycles in linear
list cycles for a team in linear
description: List cycles (sprints) for a team. Use this to find cycle IDs for creating or filtering issues.

team_id.description: Team UUID to list cycles for (use list_teams to find IDs)

limit.description: Maximum number of cycles to return (default 10, max 50)

after.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response
